title: phenax rugosus
intro: Phenax rugosus, also known as Rough Phenax, is a plant species with small, hairy leaves and stems, belonging to the family Rosaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Phenax rugosus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and coughs. Herbal preparations of Phenax rugosus are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and respiratory health.
